name: HM-Arch Memory
description: HM-Arch local SQLite memory provider for OpenClaw with auto-recall, auto-capture, and sidecar-backed durable storage.

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: SQLite database path relative to the OpenClaw config root, or an absolute path. Supports $OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR.

sidecarCommand.label: Sidecar Command
sidecarCommand.help: Command prefix that launches the HM-Arch JSONL sidecar process.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant recalled memory before each agent turn.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Persist completed user/assistant turns after each successful agent run.

topK.label: Recall Top K
topK.help: Maximum number of memory hits to retrieve.

maxContextChars.label: Max Context Chars
maxContextChars.help: Upper bound on recalled context characters injected into prompts.

consolidateOnSessionEnd.label: Consolidate On Session End
consolidateOnSessionEnd.help: Run offline consolidation when a session ends (idle/shutdown reasons).
